task_completion.description: The agent accesses the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer web console.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer login screen in a web browser.

task_completion.description: The agent logs into the web console using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the dashboard or main interface of the ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer after successful login.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the connection settings in the web UI or opens the configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'System Settings' or 'Connection Settings' page in the web console, a text editor open with the `/opt/ManageEngine/EventLog/conf/server.xml` file, or a terminal running a configuration script.

task_completion.description: The agent selects or configures the protocol to be HTTPS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'HTTPS' option selected in the web UI, the `scheme="https"` and `secure="true"` attributes being added/modified in `server.xml`, or a command specifying HTTPS.

task_completion.description: The agent sets the port number to 8443.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows '8443' entered in the port field in the web UI, `port="8443"` configured in `server.xml`, or a command specifying 8443.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the configuration changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a success message or saved state in the web UI, the text editor saving the `server.xml` file, or the successful execution of the configuration script.

task_completion.description: The agent creates the confirmation file with the required content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a terminal where the file `/home/ga/https_configured.txt` is created with the exact content `HTTPS_ENABLED:8443` (e.g., using echo or a text editor).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually applied the configuration changes in the application UI, config file, or via a legitimate script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes should be visible in the actual application interface or configuration files, not just typed out in a random text file or terminal without being applied.

integrity.description: Verify that the marker file was created in the actual system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The marker file `/home/ga/https_configured.txt` should be created using a real terminal command (like echo) or saved in a text editor, rather than just mocked on screen without saving.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open and used to manipulate the DOM to fake a success message or settings page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration for ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer is HTTPS on port 8443. The Tomcat configuration file containing these changes is located at /opt/ManageEngine/EventLog/conf/server.xml. A confirmation marker file is expected at /home/ga/https_configured.txt containing the exact string 'HTTPS_ENABLED:8443'.
